# SkemaLS

> SkemaLS builds custom AI execution systems for business owners and
individuals who want to perform at their potential but can't close the gap
between intention and result. Founded by Camden Bennett in Pinedale, Wyoming.

## What SkemaLS Does
SkemaLS configures a personalized AI system (called MySkema) around each
client's goals, values, patterns, and the specific ways they get stuck.
The system runs in the client's own Claude account. Daily 10-minute morning
check-in. Weekly AI-generated progress summaries sent to Camden for coaching
review. System is progressively refined over time. The client owns the
account and all data.

## MySkema Lite
MySkema Lite is a free 14-day structured journaling experience — a self-guided
diagnostic that surfaces the patterns, constraints, and mechanisms behind your
execution problems. Five phases over 14 days. No coaching yet. Just clarity.
Available at https://skemals.com/myskema-lite — no credit card required.

## The Three Paths
- PATH A (The Person): Individual execution system for solo operators,
  executives, and business owners. Custom Claude project, weekly coaching
  review, progressive deployment. $1,000/month.
- PATH B (The Business): Business diagnostic and AI systems plan for
  organizations where the dysfunction is structural. Bottleneck mapping,
  individual MySkema deployments for key team members, phased implementation.
  $1,500/month for 1–3 person teams.
- PATH C (Both): Hybrid engagement for business owners whose personal and
  business challenges are inseparable. Custom quote based on scope.

## About the Founder
Camden Bennett is a former U.S. Navy Diver and Intelligence Officer with
15 years of service. Managing broker at Pinedale Properties, the
top-producing real estate brokerage in Sublette County, Wyoming. Built the
SkemaLS system to solve his own productivity problem before offering it
to clients. Runs the same system he builds for every client.

## Differentiators
- Client owns their AI system — not a subscription to Camden's platform
- Built from a 60-75 minute deep-dive interview, not a template
- Human-in-the-loop weekly coaching review is what no app replicates
- Pattern recognition accumulates across months of real client data
- Progressive deployment — system expands as the client levels up
